creator: Mayra Wendolyne | Low Carb Love
source_text:
GROUND BEEF & EGGS in 15 MINS🍳🥩
(High protein, low carb)

Anyone else trying to get more protein in without overcomplicating meals? 👀💪

This beef & egg skillet is one of my favorite high-protein meals. It’s simple, packed with flavor, and comes together in no time. 🤌

Ingredients:
Ground beef
Eggs
Onions
Chili oil

Sauce:
Soy sauce
Dark soy sauce
Oyster sauce
Honey (or sweetener of your choice)
White pepper
Water

Optional: You can add a tsp of corn starch or arrowroot starch to the sauce. This will help thicken and give the meat a good texture. 

Brown the ground beef with the onions, pour in the sauce, then crack the eggs right into the skillet and cook until they’re just set.

Top with green onions and chili oil, then dig in! 🔥

Perfect when you want an easy, protein-packed meal that keeps you full and satisfied.

Would you eat this for breakfast, lunch, or dinner? 👇🍳
